privileged_info_summary: The task.json file contains no metadata field to verify. Data is synthetic: the vintage_computers.csv is generated entirely within the setup_task.sh script with hand-crafted computer collection entries. The CSV contains 10 rows of vintage computer models (Apple II Plus, Commodore 64, IBM PCjr, TRS-80 Model III, Atari 800XL, Sinclair ZX Spectrum, Amiga 500, Kaypro II, Apple IIe, TI-99/4A) with synthesized rarity, condition, acquisition dates, and parts availability information. One entry (Sinclair ZX Spectrum) intentionally has a missing year field to test incomplete data handling.
